self_improvement.claim: Retained Architecture decision persistence will drift less because closeout, backfill, and wave evaluation now share one canonical store.
self_improvement.mechanism: The canonical adoption-decision store now owns atomic write, schema-guarded read, and record-adjacent list behavior for retained Architecture decision artifacts.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: The Architecture closeout lane existed, but retained decision persistence still lived in separate host scripts.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future Architecture slices can emit and reload retained decision artifacts through one product-owned path instead of duplicated JSON handling.
self_improvement.verification_notes: The fresh source-driven slice was closed through the live lane and then reloaded through the same store in wave evaluation.

decision.rationale: The mechanism passed review, met adoption readiness, and remains valuable as Directive-owned Architecture output.
decision.forge_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
